content: The Self-Refine framework for iterative LLM output improvement can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a two-layer self-improvement architecture that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of needing no external data or additional training. This hybrid architecture leverages single-prompt iteration for local refinement and cross-perspective inconsistency detection to catch blind spots a single self-feedback loop would miss.
